entity.summary: Ethereum-ecosystem ve(3,3) decentralized exchange designed for the Ethereum mainnet environment.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded row hei_unadded_0378. Blueprint's official project publication describes it as a ve(3,3) DEX on the Ethereum blockchain and repeatedly frames the design around Ethereum mainnet. HEI therefore uses an Ethereum ecosystem origin rather than an unsupported legal-country assignment.

events.title: Blueprint recorded as Ethereum ecosystem DEX
events.description: Blueprint is recorded as an Ethereum-ecosystem ve(3,3) decentralized exchange based on its official domain, official project publication, and CoinGecko source row.
events.notes: Upgrade with a precise deployment or launch event if stronger official dated material is added.
